'''âr-h-h''' ('''karahah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jargle|jargle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jargle|jargle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-h-h
|-
! Lemma
| karahah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirahah|thirahah]] || [[word:jirahah|jirahah]] || [[word:shirahah|shirahah]] || [[word:kirahah|kirahah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurahah|thuthurahah]] || [[word:jujurahah|jujurahah]] || [[word:shushurahah|shushurahah]] || [[word:kukurahah|kukurahah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurahah|thurahah]] || [[word:jurahah|jurahah]] || [[word:shurahah|shurahah]] || [[word:kurahah|kurahah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurahah|thurahah]] || [[word:jurahah|jurahah]] || [[word:shurahah|shurahah]] || [[word:kurahah|kurahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therahah|therahah]] || [[word:jerahah|jerahah]] || [[word:sherahah|sherahah]] || [[word:kerahah|kerahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorahah|thothorahah]] || [[word:jojorahah|jojorahah]] || [[word:shoshorahah|shoshorahah]] || [[word:kokorahah|kokorahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorahah|thorahah]] || [[word:jorahah|jorahah]] || [[word:shorahah|shorahah]] || [[word:korahah|korahah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorahah|thorahah]] || [[word:jorahah|jorahah]] || [[word:shorahah|shorahah]] || [[word:korahah|korahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrahah|thĂŠrahah]] || [[word:jĂŠrahah|jĂŠrahah]] || [[word:shĂŠrahah|shĂŠrahah]] || [[word:kĂŠrahah|kĂŠrahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharahah|thatharahah]] || [[word:jajarahah|jajarahah]] || [[word:shasharahah|shasharahah]] || [[word:kakarahah|kakarahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharahah|tharahah]] || [[word:jarahah|jarahah]] || [[word:sharahah|sharahah]] || [[word:karahah|karahah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharahah|tharahah]] || [[word:jarahah|jarahah]] || [[word:sharahah|sharahah]] || [[word:karahah|karahah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharahah|sharahah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharahah|gosharahah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharahah|gokisharahah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharahahnĂŒ|sharahahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharahahnknĂŒ|gosharahahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharahahnĂŒ|gokisharahahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharahahshĂ«|sharahahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharahahnkshĂ«|gosharahahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharahahshĂ«|gokisharahahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharahahro|sharahahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharahahnkro|gosharahahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharahahro|gokisharahahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharahahmu|sharahahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharahahnkmu|gosharahahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharahahmu|gokisharahahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharahahsher|sharahahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharahahnksher|gosharahahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharahahsher|gokisharahahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharahahng|sharahahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharahahnkng|gosharahahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharahahng|gokisharahahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharahahya|sharahahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharahahnkya|gosharahahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharahahya|gokisharahahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharahahyam|sharahahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharahahnkyam|gosharahahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharahahyam|gokisharahahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharahahnĂŒshĂ«|sharahahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharahahnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharahahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharahahnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharahahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharahahnĂŒro|sharahahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharahahnknĂŒro|gosharahahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharahahnĂŒro|gokisharahahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharahahnĂŒmu|sharahahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharahahnknĂŒmu|gosharahahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharahahnĂŒmu|gokisharahahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharahahshĂ«nĂŒ|sharahahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharahahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharahahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharahahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharahahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharahahshĂ«ro|sharahahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharahahnkshĂ«ro|gosharahahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharahahshĂ«ro|gokisharahahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharahahshĂ«mu|sharahahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharahahnkshĂ«mu|gosharahahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharahahshĂ«mu|gokisharahahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharahahronĂŒ|sharahahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharahahnkronĂŒ|gosharahahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharahahronĂŒ|gokisharahahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharahahroshĂ«|sharahahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharahahnkroshĂ«|gosharahahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharahahroshĂ«|gokisharahahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharahahromu|sharahahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharahahnkromu|gosharahahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharahahromu|gokisharahahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharahahmunĂŒ|sharahahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharahahnkmunĂŒ|gosharahahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharahahmunĂŒ|gokisharahahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharahahmushĂ«|sharahahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharahahnkmushĂ«|gosharahahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharahahmushĂ«|gokisharahahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharahahmuro|sharahahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharahahnkmuro|gosharahahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharahahmuro|gokisharahahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
